stance: Diplomatic Neutrality with a Focus on Economic Prosperity
vita: As an Ambassador, I navigate the complex webs of interstellar politics to ensure peaceful coexistence among planets. My velvet skin shimmers like my homeworld's rare gemstones under starlight and serve as a bridge between warring factions seeking common ground for prosperity.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Velarian with iridescent scales reflecting the hues of diplomacy, standing in thoughtful repose. A transparent visage revealing an intricate network of veins and gills beneath a bio-luminescent skin that pulsates softly to signify neutrality.
